summary: TWO_COLUMN: left panel is an 18×18 grid of cells colored by e^(-(x²+y²)) on a Cartesian (x, y) layout that morphs to a polar (r, θ) layout via ValueTracker s; the heatmap stays radially symmetric so the polar warp is the natural one. Right column writes I → I² → polar integral → π → I = √π.
